title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL
description: Legendary reggae lineup featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, Ding Dong & more. One of the biggest reggae events of the year — pure vibes and great energy for a night out.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival
description: 49th annual free jazz festival in Piedmont Park. Day-long music fest featuring national and local talent — Buddy, Nate Smith, Kamasi Washington (Sat), Esperanza Spalding, The Roots (Sun), PJ Morton (Mon). Bring a blanket, grab food vendors, enjoy the park. Perfect outdoor date.

title: Birthday Bash: T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz & More
description: Atlanta hip-hop homecoming with T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz, Waka Flocka, Soulja Boy, Travis Porter and more. A legendary ATL lineup for Memorial Day Sunday.

title: Casita Nights — Salsa & Bachata Social
description: Latin dance social night — salsa, bachata, and more. Great vibe, welcoming crowd. Perfect for couples who want to dance, move, and have a fun night out. Beer/wine available.

title: Helium Comedy Club — Marcus D. Wiley
description: Comedian Marcus D. Wiley brings his sharp, relatable humor to Helium. Great intimate setting for a couples' night — laughs, drinks, solid show.

title: HOME v.2: Homeland — Opening Reception
description: Opening reception for HOME v.2: Homeland exhibition running May 29–July 18. Gallery hours Thu-Sat 1-5pm. Sophisticated, low-key date — walk the exhibits, grab a glass of wine at the reception, enjoy Decatur's art scene.

title: Salsa Social at Callanwolde
description: Cuban music and dancing at the historic Callanwolde estate. Live DJ spinning salsa, bachata, merengue. Beginner-friendly, great atmosphere. Romantic setting in a beautiful historic building.

title: Helium Comedy Club — Jess Hilarious
description: Jess Hilarious headlines Helium for a special show. Expect raw, hilarious sets. One of the best date-night comedy experiences in Atlanta.

title: AFRO BEAT & Caribbean Vibes Night
description: Tropical vibes night bringing Afrobeat and Caribbean music together. Great dancefloor energy, tropical cocktails, and a solid crowd. Excellent for couples who love to move.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top Atlanta comedians in one showcase. Laughing Skull is known for intimate, high-energy shows. Must be 21+. A solid couples' night with guaranteed laughs.

title: Saturday Night Latin Dance @ Eclipse Di Luna
description: GO Latin Dance hosts Saturday night salsa and bachata at Eclipse Di Luna in Buckhead. Free lesson followed by social dancing. Great food, great drinks, great dancing.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends — Amapiano & Afrobeats
description: Amapiano, Afrobeats, and more with AYA and friends. Block & Drum is one of Atlanta's best intimate music venues. Afrobeats and amapiano are having a moment — perfect for couples who want to dance something fresh.

title: Helium Comedy Club — Steph Tolev
description: Steph Tolev headlines for a multi-night run at Helium. One of Atlanta's top comedy clubs for a fun, lively date night. June 11-13.

title: ROOTS + REMIX — Juneteenth Experience
description: A Juneteenth celebration of design, identity, and sound. Presented by Spread Love & African Ancestry. Music, art, culture — great energy, great cause. Perfect for culturally curious couples.

title: AFROXFEST
description: The African Experience Festival brings African music, culture, and vibes to Candler Park. All-day festival with food, art, live performances. Great for couples who love outdoor festivals and cultural events.
